summary: Completed testing of chunked translation and real-time progress bar features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend tests passed (100%). The /api/languages endpoint has been REMOVED as requested (returns 404). The queue-status endpoint returns all required progress fields (step, progress, total, elapsed, eta). The translate-segments endpoint accepts target_language param. The ProcessingOverlay component has progress bar UI with segment count, percentage, elapsed time, and ETA.
passed_tests: queue-status returns all required fields: step, progress, total, elapsed, eta
queue-status returns progress=0, total=0 when no processing is happening
queue-status elapsed and eta are numeric values
POST translate-segments accepts target_language query param
translate-segments defaults to 'km' when no target_language provided
queue-status response has correct structure and data types
Output language selector dropdown visible in editor sidebar
Translate button shows 'Translate to Khmer' text
ProcessingOverlay shows progress count with segments format
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warnings in App.js (useEffect missing dependencies) - not blocking
seed_data_creation: Created test project with segments to verify language selector visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Progress bar and chunked translation features fully implemented and tested. Backend queue-status endpoint returns step/progress/total/elapsed/eta fields. /api/languages endpoint REMOVED (languages stored in frontend OUTPUT_LANGUAGES dict). translate-segments accepts ?target_language=xx param. ProcessingOverlay component shows progress bar when progressInfo has data (progress-bar-container, progress-count data-testids). Test session: test_session: [REDACTED].

features_verified.queue_status_endpoint: Returns step, progress, total, elapsed, eta fields
features_verified.queue_status_idle: Returns progress=0, total=0 when no processing
features_verified.translate_segments_param: Accepts target_language query param, defaults to 'km'
features_verified.output_language_selector: Dropdown with 20 options visible in editor
features_verified.processing_overlay_progress_bar: Shows segment count, percentage, elapsed time, ETA when progressInfo has data
